metar.name: Ozark/Cairns AAF, AL, US
metar.rawOb: SPECI KOZR 040524Z AUTO 08003KT 10SM CLR 19/18 A3018 RMK AO2 SLP220 $

sevenDay.synopsis: There's a mixed bag of cigs in the LFA, but around these parts, we are VFR. For the PM, there's a slight chance of a shower or two. Rain chances increase for tomorrow. IFR sets up early Saturday AM, and there's a slight chance for ISOLD showers/TS for the PM. On Sunday, here comes a cold front that promises to deliver another round of showers during the AM/PM periods. Winds will pick up behind the front. Weather looks decent as we return to training on Monday. A system tracking across the N Gulf could nudge a few showers up our way on Monday and Tuesday, but by Wednesday, we're all clear.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 02 APR - 08 APR
